assertions.title: Onboard Failed (rejected, red) renders

steps.expected: Timeout variant shows amber alert with title 'Onboarding Timed Out' and timeout body copy.
steps.observed: Observed amber alert with background rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.1), border rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.25), title color rgb(250, 204, 21), body color rgb(253, 230, 138).

steps.expected: Rejected variant shows red alert with title 'Onboarding Rejected', body 'Challenge verification failed. You may not have a valid share for this group.', and CTAs 'Retry' + 'Back to Onboarding'.
steps.observed: Observed required title/body copy and both CTAs. Alert styles were background rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1), border rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.25), title color rgb(248, 113, 113), body color rgb(252, 165, 165).

steps.expected: Rejected alert styling is visually distinct red from timeout amber.
steps.observed: Comparison confirms distinct color families: timeout uses amber (234/179/8, 250/204/21, 253/230/138) while rejected uses red (239/68/68, 248/113/113, 252/165/165).

steps.action: Check console/page errors on both pages
steps.expected: No console errors and no unhandled page errors.
steps.observed: No page errors (errors: []). Console contained only Vite debug connect logs and React DevTools info message; no error-level logs.

evidence.network: No relevant API requests for this assertion; SPA document/assets only.

assertions.rationale: VAL-ONB-004 contract requirements were fully met: rejected variant rendered required red styling, exact copy, and required CTAs; red variant is clearly distinct from timeout amber variant.

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-ONB-004): passed. Rejected failure variant is correctly red and visually distinct from timeout amber variant, with no console/page errors.
